title: Shape Shifter Curse Minimal
description: This modpack is the smallest out-of-the-box modpack for the Shape Shifter Curse mod, created to save time on configuring it's dependent mods.
body:
# Shape Shifter Curse Minimal Pack
![Shape Shifter Curse Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7775f3095512704895e48bdbcea49bced6792af4.png)

This modpack is the smallest out-of-the-box modpack for the [Shape Shifter Curse mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/shape-shifter-curse), created to save time on configuring it's dependent mods.

It only contains the dependent mods required by the Shape Shifter Curse mod, as well as a few quality-of-life mods. After installation, you can freely add any additional mods you prefer.

The version number of the modpack matches the version number of the Shape Shifter Curse mod contained within it.

---

这一整合包是Shape Shifter Curse模组的开箱即用的最小整合包，为了节省配置前置Mod的时间而制作

其中只包含Shape Shifter Curse模组所需的前置，以及少量不影响玩法的Qol模组。在安装之后，你可以在其中自由添加喜好的模组

整合包的版本号与其中Shape Shifter Curse模组的版本号保持一致
